text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hehe… Ah, sorry. I lost my composure.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You see, I just received a thank-you letter 
from a young girl I once saved from trouble. 
She says I was just like a superhero fighting 
for justice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It began when I heard plaintive whimpers 
coming from within a small shed… The door 
was rusted and would not open, so I delivered
a swift punch!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It is so rewarding to see the techniques 
I trained so hard prove useful to others. 
I shall continue to strive for mastery!
